title: Source and Relationship Combinations
description: Practice two source, relationship, topic, or movement phrases in each sentence.

questions.sentence: I received a message ___ Aya ___ the meeting.
questions.completedSentence: I received a message from Aya about the meeting.
questions.japanese: 会議についてアヤからメッセージを受け取った。

questions.sentence: The path goes ___ the park ___ the station.
questions.completedSentence: The path goes through the park to the station.
questions.japanese: その道は公園を通って駅へ続いている。

questions.sentence: She stood ___ her friends ___ a red umbrella.
questions.completedSentence: She stood among her friends with a red umbrella.
questions.japanese: 彼女は赤い傘を持って友人たちの中に立っていた。

questions.sentence: The plane flew ___ the city ___ the east.
questions.completedSentence: The plane flew over the city from the east.
questions.japanese: 飛行機は東から町の上空を飛んだ。

questions.sentence: We walked ___ the lake ___ our teacher.
questions.completedSentence: We walked around the lake with our teacher.
questions.japanese: 先生と一緒に湖の周りを歩いた。

questions.sentence: They argued ___ the plan ___ several examples.
questions.completedSentence: They argued against the plan with several examples.
questions.japanese: 彼らはいくつかの例を挙げてその計画に反対した。

questions.sentence: The cover ___ the book shows a photo ___ the author.
questions.completedSentence: The cover of the book shows a photo of the author.
questions.japanese: その本の表紙には著者の写真が載っている。

questions.sentence: He sent the file ___ me ___ his phone.
questions.completedSentence: He sent the file to me from his phone.
questions.japanese: 彼は携帯電話から私にファイルを送った。

questions.sentence: A road runs ___ the village ___ the hill.
questions.completedSentence: A road runs through the village around the hill.
questions.japanese: 道路は村を通り、丘の周りを続いている。

questions.sentence: The teacher spoke ___ climate change ___ the class.
questions.completedSentence: The teacher spoke about climate change to the class.
questions.japanese: 先生はクラスに気候変動について話した。

questions.sentence: The bridge stretches ___ the river ___ the island.
questions.completedSentence: The bridge stretches over the river to the island.
questions.japanese: 橋は川の上を島まで伸びている。

questions.sentence: She shared the snacks ___ the students ___ a smile.
questions.completedSentence: She shared the snacks among the students with a smile.
questions.japanese: 彼女は笑顔で学生たちにお菓子を分けた。

questions.sentence: We learned ___ the history ___ the town.
questions.completedSentence: We learned about the history of the town.
questions.japanese: その町の歴史について学んだ。

questions.sentence: The train came ___ Osaka ___ Kyoto.
questions.completedSentence: The train came from Osaka through Kyoto.
questions.japanese: 列車は京都を通って大阪から来た。

questions.sentence: The player competed ___ Ken ___ confidence.
questions.completedSentence: The player competed against Ken with confidence.
questions.japanese: その選手は自信を持ってケンと対戦した。

questions.sentence: I borrowed a book ___ the library ___ space travel.
questions.completedSentence: I borrowed a book from the library about space travel.
questions.japanese: 宇宙旅行についての本を図書館から借りた。

questions.sentence: The river flows ___ the city ___ the sea.
questions.completedSentence: The river flows through the city to the sea.
questions.japanese: 川は町を通って海へ流れている。

questions.sentence: He sat ___ the audience ___ his parents.
questions.completedSentence: He sat among the audience with his parents.
questions.japanese: 彼は両親と一緒に観客の中に座った。

questions.sentence: A helicopter passed ___ the stadium ___ the north.
questions.completedSentence: A helicopter passed over the stadium from the north.
questions.japanese: ヘリコプターが北からスタジアムの上空を通過した。

questions.sentence: We drove ___ the island ___ a local guide.
questions.completedSentence: We drove around the island with a local guide.
questions.japanese: 地元のガイドと島を一周した。

questions.sentence: The team played ___ us ___ great energy.
questions.completedSentence: The team played against us with great energy.
questions.japanese: そのチームは大きな勢いで私たちと対戦した。

questions.sentence: The name ___ the street comes ___ a famous writer.
questions.completedSentence: The name of the street comes from a famous writer.
questions.japanese: その通りの名前は有名な作家に由来する。

questions.sentence: She gave the tickets ___ Ken ___ Aya.
questions.completedSentence: She gave the tickets to Ken from Aya.
questions.japanese: 彼女はアヤから受け取ったチケットをケンに渡した。

questions.sentence: The wind moved ___ the trees ___ the house.
questions.completedSentence: The wind moved through the trees around the house.
questions.japanese: 風は木々の間を通り、家の周りを吹いた。

questions.sentence: We spoke ___ the problem ___ our professor.
questions.completedSentence: We spoke about the problem with our professor.
questions.japanese: その問題について教授と話した。

questions.sentence: The road goes ___ the mountain ___ the coast.
questions.completedSentence: The road goes over the mountain to the coast.
questions.japanese: 道路は山を越えて海岸へ続いている。

questions.sentence: The prize was divided ___ the winners ___ care.
questions.completedSentence: The prize was divided among the winners with care.
questions.japanese: 賞は注意深く受賞者たちの間で分けられた。

questions.sentence: I read an article ___ the future ___ education.
questions.completedSentence: I read an article about the future of education.
questions.japanese: 教育の未来についての記事を読んだ。

questions.sentence: The package arrived ___ Canada ___ Singapore.
questions.completedSentence: The package arrived from Canada through Singapore.
questions.japanese: 荷物はシンガポールを経由してカナダから届いた。

questions.sentence: The workers protested ___ the change ___ signs.
questions.completedSentence: The workers protested against the change with signs.
questions.japanese: 労働者たちはプラカードを持ってその変更に抗議した。

questions.sentence: She received advice ___ her mentor ___ job interviews.
questions.completedSentence: She received advice from her mentor about job interviews.
questions.japanese: 就職面接について指導者から助言を受けた。

questions.sentence: The students walked ___ the museum ___ the exit.
questions.completedSentence: The students walked through the museum to the exit.
questions.japanese: 学生たちは博物館の中を通って出口へ歩いた。

questions.sentence: He felt comfortable ___ classmates ___ similar interests.
questions.completedSentence: He felt comfortable among classmates with similar interests.
questions.japanese: 彼は似た興味を持つクラスメートの中で安心していた。

questions.sentence: Birds flew ___ the lake ___ the south.
questions.completedSentence: Birds flew over the lake from the south.
questions.japanese: 鳥たちは南から湖の上を飛んだ。

questions.sentence: We traveled ___ the city ___ our cousins.
questions.completedSentence: We traveled around the city with our cousins.
questions.japanese: いとこたちと町を巡った。

questions.sentence: The club voted ___ the proposal ___ a clear majority.
questions.completedSentence: The club voted against the proposal with a clear majority.
questions.japanese: そのクラブは明確な多数で提案に反対票を投じた。

questions.sentence: The sound ___ the bell came ___ the tower.
questions.completedSentence: The sound of the bell came from the tower.
questions.japanese: 鐘の音が塔から聞こえた。

questions.sentence: I sent a reply ___ the office ___ my laptop.
questions.completedSentence: I sent a reply to the office from my laptop.
questions.japanese: ノートパソコンから事務室に返信を送った。

questions.sentence: Sunlight came ___ the window ___ the desk.
questions.completedSentence: Sunlight came through the window over the desk.
questions.japanese: 日光が窓から入り、机の上に差した。

questions.sentence: The guide spoke ___ the castle ___ the visitors.
questions.completedSentence: The guide spoke about the castle to the visitors.
questions.japanese: ガイドは見学者たちに城について話した。

questions.sentence: A cable runs ___ the road ___ the building.
questions.completedSentence: A cable runs over the road to the building.
questions.japanese: ケーブルは道路の上を通って建物まで伸びている。

questions.sentence: The teacher moved ___ the groups ___ a clipboard.
questions.completedSentence: The teacher moved among the groups with a clipboard.
questions.japanese: 先生はクリップボードを持ってグループの間を移動した。

questions.sentence: We discussed the causes ___ the problem ___ the committee.
questions.completedSentence: We discussed the causes of the problem with the committee.
questions.japanese: その問題の原因について委員会と話し合った。

questions.sentence: The train traveled ___ Fukuoka ___ Hiroshima.
questions.completedSentence: The train traveled from Fukuoka through Hiroshima.
questions.japanese: 列車は広島を通って福岡から走ってきた。

questions.sentence: Our team competed ___ theirs ___ determination.
questions.completedSentence: Our team competed against theirs with determination.
questions.japanese: 私たちのチームは決意を持って相手チームと競った。

questions.sentence: I got a postcard ___ Yuki ___ her trip.
questions.completedSentence: I got a postcard from Yuki about her trip.
questions.japanese: 旅行についてユキからはがきを受け取った。

questions.sentence: The trail leads ___ the forest ___ the lake.
questions.completedSentence: The trail leads through the forest to the lake.
questions.japanese: 小道は森を通って湖へ続いている。

questions.sentence: She moved ___ the guests ___ a tray.
questions.completedSentence: She moved among the guests with a tray.
questions.japanese: 彼女は盆を持って客の間を移動した。

questions.sentence: The drone flew ___ the field ___ the west.
questions.completedSentence: The drone flew over the field from the west.
questions.japanese: ドローンは西から野原の上を飛んだ。

questions.sentence: We looked ___ the market ___ our guide.
questions.completedSentence: We looked around the market with our guide.
questions.japanese: ガイドと市場を見て回った。

questions.sentence: The students spoke ___ the rule ___ strong reasons.
questions.completedSentence: The students spoke against the rule with strong reasons.
questions.japanese: 学生たちは強い理由を挙げてその規則に反対した。

questions.sentence: The title ___ the article came ___ a poem.
questions.completedSentence: The title of the article came from a poem.
questions.japanese: その記事の題名は詩から取られた。

questions.sentence: He handed the form ___ me ___ the receptionist.
questions.completedSentence: He handed the form to me from the receptionist.
questions.japanese: 彼は受付係から受け取った用紙を私に渡した。

questions.sentence: The river passes ___ the valley ___ the town.
questions.completedSentence: The river passes through the valley around the town.
questions.japanese: 川は谷を通り、町の周りを流れている。

questions.sentence: The professor talked ___ memory ___ the students.
questions.completedSentence: The professor talked about memory to the students.
questions.japanese: 教授は学生たちに記憶について話した。

questions.sentence: The path climbs ___ the hill ___ the temple.
questions.completedSentence: The path climbs over the hill to the temple.
questions.japanese: 道は丘を越えて寺まで続いている。

questions.sentence: The coach walked ___ the players ___ a whistle.
questions.completedSentence: The coach walked among the players with a whistle.
questions.japanese: コーチは笛を持って選手たちの間を歩いた。

questions.sentence: The end ___ the film surprised all ___ us.
questions.completedSentence: The end of the film surprised all of us.
questions.japanese: その映画の結末は私たち全員を驚かせた。

questions.sentence: The flight came ___ Seoul ___ Osaka.
questions.completedSentence: The flight came from Seoul through Osaka.
questions.japanese: その便は大阪を経由してソウルから来た。

questions.sentence: The candidate argued ___ the policy ___ confidence.
questions.completedSentence: The candidate argued against the policy with confidence.
questions.japanese: その候補者は自信を持って政策に反対した。
